title: Memory
subtitle: Stores durable preferences, project facts, instructions, and decisions locally in IndexedDB. Retrieved memories may be sent to the current model as context.
searchToggleDesc: Allow the model to call a local memory search tool when past context may matter.
recordToggleDesc: Use a background AI task to save only important long-term information.
dreamToggleDesc: When active memories exceed 100, consolidate them into 50 or fewer entries.
privacyNote: Memories stay in this browser by default. Search results are included in the current model request when the memory tool is used.
contentPlaceholder: Write a durable preference, instruction, project fact, warning, decision, or context note…
